subject:
Any experiences with using Warp through a Windows virtual machine
 with GPU passthrough?
body:
I'd be interested in hearing about others' experience with trying to run 
Warp through a Windows virtual machine on a Linux system with GPU 
passthrough. I'm putting together a cryoET workstation and would like to 
know if something like this could work, and if it does, what needs to be 
done to make it work.

Best,
Dennis
